---
title: "About Me"
---

<div class="about-container">

<!-- Intro Section -->
<div class="about-hero">
<img src="images/selfy.png" class="about-photo"/>
<div class="about-text">
<h1>Hi, I'm Youwei 👋</h1>
<p>
I'm a graduate student in Biostatistics at Emory University who enjoys 
working at the intersection of data, health, and real-world impact.
</p>
<p>
I like turning messy data into meaningful insights — whether that's 
understanding brain activity through EEG signals or modeling how 
viruses behave over time.
</p>
</div>
</div>

<!-- My Journey -->
<div class="about-section">
<h2>My Journey</h2>
<p>
I started in financial mathematics, where I built a strong foundation in 
analytical thinking and modeling. Over time, I became more interested in 
applying these tools to problems that directly impact people's lives — 
which led me to biostatistics.
</p>
</div>

<!-- What I Work On -->
<div class="about-section">
<h2>What I Work On</h2>
<ul class="work-list">
<li>🧠 EEG biomarkers for Alzheimer's disease</li>
<li>🦠 Infectious disease modeling and viral shedding dynamics</li>
<li>📊 Bayesian modeling and statistical inference</li>
<li>📈 Interactive data visualization (Shiny dashboards)</li>
</ul>
</div>

<!-- Fun Section -->
<div class="about-section">
<h2>Beyond Data</h2>
<p>
Outside of research, I enjoy exploring new technologies, thinking about 
how data can drive better decisions, and continuously learning new tools 
in statistics and data science.
</p>
</div>

<!-- Call to Action -->
<div class="about-buttons">
<a href="projects.html" class="btn-primary">View My Work</a>
<a href="files/CV.pdf" class="btn-secondary">Download CV</a>
</div>

</div>
